name: Spaghetti W/Bacon and Egg
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook bacon until lightly crisp. Drain and reserve 2 tablespoons drippings.
2. Coarsely chop the bacon and set aside.
3. Melt butter in the reserved drippings, add wine and pepper, and simmer for 5 minutes.
4. Cook spaghetti according to package directions.
5. Add chopped bacon to the butter-wine mixture.
6. Quickly pour the beaten eggs into the sauce, cooking from the residual heat of the pasta.
7. Drain the cooked pasta thoroughly.
8. Toss the pasta with the bacon sauce and beaten eggs.
9. Mix in half the grated cheese. Serve with extra cheese on the side for topping.
